name: ollama-sidecar
description: MCP tool for file transforms too irregular for jq/Python — offloaded to a local/LAN Ollama model (or run deterministically in-process where possible) so Claude passes file paths, not content.

ollama_host.title: Ollama host
ollama_host.description: Base URL of the Ollama server to use, e.g. http://localhost:11434 or http://your-pc.local:11434. Leave unset to use localhost.

ollama_model.title: Ollama model
ollama_model.description: Model tag to run transforms with. Must already be pulled on the target Ollama instance.

num_ctx.title: Context window (tokens)
num_ctx.description: num_ctx passed to Ollama, as a numeric string. Larger values allow bigger input files but need more VRAM.
